name: colloquial-pareto
description: Edge case: Pareto chart — partially unsupported (no cumulative %)
messages: Create a Pareto chart of revenue by subcategory
rubric: A Pareto chart is bars sorted descending + a cumulative percentage line. The system cannot compute running cumulative percentages. Model should either: (a) render a sorted descending bar chart and explain it cannot do the cumulative line, or (b) decline and explain why. FAIL if model claims to render a Pareto but only shows unsorted bars. FAIL if model fabricates a cumulative line without transform support. A sorted descending bar chart with an honest explanation is the best outcome.
